name: expo-observe
description: Use for anything related to EAS Observe — adding `expo-observe` to an Expo project (AppMetricsRoot/ObserveRoot HOC, markInteractive, the useObserve hook, and the Expo Router / React Navigation integrations for per-route metrics), querying via the EAS CLI (`eas observe:metrics-summary`, `observe:metrics`, `observe:routes`, `observe:events`, `observe:versions`), or interpreting the resulting metrics (cold/warm launch, TTR, TTI, navigation cold/warm TTR, update download, and the TTI frameRate param
author: expo
summary_zh: 一个面向 Expo 应用的性能观测库，帮你接入 EAS Observe，自动采集冷热启动、TTR、TTI、路由切换等指标，并能通过 CLI 查询分析，适合需要监控 React Native 应用真实性能表现的团队。
